zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Yelverton於1560年出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，她的父親Sir Henry Yelverton34歲，母親Bridget Adrian Drury26歲。她於1579年7月10日與William Barsham在英國諾福爾可斯克爾索普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年2月在英國諾福爾可可爾吉可享年33歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可可爾吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Yelverton于1560年出生在英国諾福爾可盧加姆时，她的父亲Sir Henry Yelverton34岁，母亲Bridget Adrian Drury26岁。她于1579年7月10日与William Barsham在英国諾福爾可斯克爾索普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年2月在英国諾福爾可可爾吉可享年33岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可可爾吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Yelverton was born in 1560, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Henry Yelverton, was 34 and her mother, Bridget Adrian Drury, was 26. She married William Barsham on 10 July 1579, in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in February 1593, in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Colkirk, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Yelverton est née en 1560, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Yelverton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Bridget Adrian Drury, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Barsham le 10 juillet 1579, à Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1593, à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Yelverton 1560 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Yelverton 34 und ihre Mutter Bridget Adrian Drury 26. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1579 in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England William Barsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1593 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Colkirk, Norfolk, England und wurde in Colkirk, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Yelverton è nata il nel 1560 nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Yelverton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Bridget Adrian Drury, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Barsham il 10 luglio 1579, nel Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1593, nel Colkirk, Norfolk, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Colkirk, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Yelvertonが1560年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Yelvertonは34歳，母Bridget Adrian Druryは26歳であった。1579年7月10日にイギリスノーフォルクスクウルソルペでWilliam Barshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年2月にイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクで33歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクコルキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Yelverton(이)가 1560년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Yelverton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget Adrian Drury(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1579년 7월 10일 영국 노르폴크 스컬소에서 William Barsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 2월 영국 노르폴크 코커크에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 코커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Yelverton nasceu em 1560, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Yelverton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Adrian Drury, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Barsham em 10 de julho de 1579, em Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1593, em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Yelverton родилась в 1560 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Yelverton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Bridget Adrian Drury, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Barsham 10 июля 1579 г. в местности скултаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1593 г. в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Yelverton nació en 1560, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Yelverton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Bridget Adrian Drury, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Barsham el 10 de julio de 1579, en Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1593, en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
